title: 建筑空间场景图
description: 这是一张复古 35mm 胶片感人像照片，强调直闪、随手拍、轻微粗糙、不完美的真实感。适合时尚写真、生活方式照片、复古人像、社媒头像和角色真人化。
prompt_raw: A vintage 35mm film photograph of a young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair and wispy bangs. She is wearing a white ribbed tank top and a loose beige knit cardigan slipping off one shoulder, along with a delicate silver necklace. She has soft makeup with pink blush and glossy lips, looking directly at the camera with slightly parted lips. The lighting is harsh direct camera flash, creating a candid, amateur snapshot aesthetic. The background is a dimly lit, slightly messy room with clothes on a table and a wooden shelf. The image features heavy film grain, slightly muted colors, and a nostalgic, highly realistic photographic texture.
prompt_display_cn: 这是一张复古 35mm 胶片感人像照片，强调直闪、随手拍、轻微粗糙、不完美的真实感。适合时尚写真、生活方式照片、复古人像、社媒头像和角色真人化。
prompt_template_cn: 生成一张复古 35mm 胶片摄影风格人像。主体是【人物描述】，发型为【发型】，穿着【服装】，佩戴【饰品】。妆容为【妆容风格】，表情【表情】，看向【视线方向】。光线使用强烈直接相机闪光灯，制造随手拍、业余快照和真实生活感。背景为【背景场景】，可以略显杂乱但自然。画面有胶片颗粒、轻微过曝、硬阴影、肤色真实、构图稍微随意。不要过度精修，不要商业棚拍感。
variables_json: [{"key":"人物描述","label":"人物描述","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"发型","label":"发型","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"服装","label":"服装","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"饰品","label":"饰品","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"妆容风格","label":"妆容风格","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"表情","label":"表情","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"视线方向","label":"视线方向","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"背景场景","label":"背景场景","type":"text","required":true}]
